Notes: Use to verify server + dependencies are up.

Description: SSE: generate charts from an NL question
Query Params: query (str required), project_type (str required "NTM" | "AHLOB Modernization" | "Both"), user_id (str required), max_charts (int default 3), thread_id (str required)
Response: text/event-stream — events: stream_started → step (×3) → retrieval_done → traversal_done → complete {charts:[...]
Notes: rationale
column10: Long-lived stream. First event gives query_id. `complete.charts[i]` is the full chart object (matches strict union).

Notes: Sorted newest-first by updated_at.

Response: {thread_id, messages: [{role:"user"|"ai", query_id, content, charts?:[], status?, created_at, duration_ms?}]}
Notes: 403 if thread doesn't belong to user_id. Each turn = 2 messages paired by query_id.

Description: List charts filtered by ONE scope
Query Params: exactly ONE of: query_id (str) | user_id (str) | thread_id (str); limit (int default 100, ≤500)
Response: {charts: [{chart_id, query_id, user_id, thread_id, chart_index, chart_type, title_text, subtitle_text, description, insight, script, colors, ..., chart: <Highcharts config>}]}
Notes: 400 if more/less than one filter. `chart` key holds the reconstructed Highcharts config.

Response: Same row shape as /charts but single object
Notes: 404 if chart_id not found.

Description: Apply NL edit to a saved chart
Notes: Edits are canvas-scoped via clone-on-add. Takes ~3-10s (LLM call).

Description: Audit log of edits for a chart
Notes: Newest first.
Server-rendered chart (matplotlib) + insight callout. 403 if not owner.
Two sheets: About (title/subtitle/insight) + Data (cartesian: category × series; pie: Name/Value/%).

Response: {drafts: [{draft_id, user_id, name, project_type, created_at, updated_at, slots: [...]}]}
Notes: Each draft's slots are inlined with reconstructed chart per slot.

Response: {draft_id, user_id, name, project_type, created_at, updated_at, slots: []}
Notes: Returns the new draft with empty slots.

Response: Full draft object with slots[] inlined (each slot has chart, x, y, w, h, position, slot_id, chart_id, draft_id, created_at)
Notes: 404 if not found.
Both fields optional. `slots` REPLACES the list. x/y/w/h FREE-FORM floats (fractions of canvas). Server auto-places if omitted. Clone-on-add on first-time use; re-uses chart_id on drag/move.
404 on 2nd delete (idempotent via 404).
One chart per page (full page) + insight callout. 403 if not owner.

Description: Save canvas as template (upsert by draft_id)
Notes: Server pulls slots from the draft — no chart payload in the body. Upsert by draft_id → same draft never creates two templates. 403 if draft.user_id ≠ payload.user_id.
Lightweight picker list — ID + title only.

Response: {template_id, user_id, source_draft_id, title, project_type, created_at, last_run_at, selections: [...]}
Notes: 403 if template.user_id ≠ user_id.

Response: {template_id, selections: [...rebuilt...], charts: [...], script_reports: [{chart_id, status, error, elapsed_ms}], rendered_at}
Notes: Re-runs each selection's chart.script in the sandbox; rebuilds chart + LLM-refreshed insight. Bumps last_run_at. Takes ~2-10s.
Re-runs scripts (fresh data) then renders to PDF. One chart per page. 403 if not owner.
